productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed White Tshirts
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed  neckline, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, blue stitch detailing along the seams and hemline and slightly distressed look graphic print on the back and upper left chestFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBold and stylish, this white t-shirt from united colors of benetton is perfect for casual wear. The distressed look print on the back and on the upper left chest inspired by bikers gets you into an adventurous mood, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
